name: KorYor9
query:
SELECT 
P.transaction_date as 'creation_date',
P.supplier_name as 'supplier', 
PI.item_code as 'item_name', 
PI.lot_no as 'lot_no',
PI.stock_qty as 'qty',
PI.stock_uom as 'uom'
FROM `tabPurchase Order` P
JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` PI
ON P.name = PI.parent
WHERE P.per_received = 100 and P.status = 'Completed'
AND P.creation between %(from_date)s and %(to_date)s
AND PI.lot_no is not null
and P.supplier_name not in ('ร้านยาอื่นๆ', 'ร้านค้าอื่นๆ Shopee LZD etc.', 'Shopee')
